faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Great Kills homes?
faqs.answer: Great Kills residents most frequently encounter pavement ants, odorous house ants, and carpenter ants. The waterfront location also contributes to moisture issues that attract these species. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures in homes, especially older properties near Great Kills Park.
